title: Shan He She Ji Tu
titleNative: 山河社稷图
synopsis: If you could change the world, what would you do? And if you had the chance to change your life, would you? There are two worlds that exist: reality; and a world that you think is reality. Da Wei is a young man who doesn’t care about anyone or anything aside from himself. However, when he finds out that his entire world is nothing more than an illusion and what’s more, it’s on the brink of collapse, will he make the decision to involve himself for the first time in something for the sake of others?

title: Oshiri Tantei: SHIRIARTY
titleNative: 映画おしりたんてい シリアーティ
synopsis: In Oshiri Tantei: SHIRIARTY , a baffling series of crimes turns out to be the work of Shiriarty, a villain who seeks to steal a mysterious treasure known as the "O-PARTS". Butt Detective along with his assistant, Brown, enlist the aid of Audrey, an investigator from the international police organization Wanterpol, in an effort to prevent the "O-PARTS" from falling into the wrong hands while Shiriarty strives to plunge the world into darkness. (Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

title: Ye De Ming Ming Shu
titleNative: 夜的命名术
synopsis: After a difficult upbringing, Qingchen's life takes a drastic turn when a mysterious countdown emerges on his arm. He is taken to Prison No. 18, a dangerous parallel universe, when it reaches zero. He overcomes severe adversity and gains the respect of the demigod Li Shutong by using his cunning and bravery. He then becomes his disciple and embarks on a journey of genuine transformation.

title: Rootless heart
titleNative: さまよう心臓
synopsis: Two boys are playing in ruins. There is something lurking in the dark...This is the stop motion animation on the theme of fear. Graduate Work 2011, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation Prize: 2012 Puchon International Fantastic Film Festival in 2012, Jury's Choice 2012 24th Tokyo Students Film Festival, Grand prize＆Audience Award 2012 Independent Animation Festival, Jury's Choice 2012 Yubari International Fantastic Film Festival in 2012, scholarship 2011 Shimokitazawa Film Festival, Grand prize 2011 West Tokyo Film Festival, Excellence Award (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Eternal Flame
titleNative: 無限の火
synopsis: In the pitch darkness a man cannot see anything. Only light source is a light lit with a match by someone else. The light is lit and put out. This repeats sometime and eventually the man makes up his mind. 1st year work 2016, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: The Great Detective Sherlock Holmes - The Greatest Jail-Breaker
titleEnglish: The Great Detective Sherlock Holmes - The Greatest Jail-Breaker
titleNative: 大偵探福爾摩斯 逃獄大追捕
synonyms: Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
大侦探福尔摩斯：逃狱大追捕
synopsis: In the late 19th century, Mack, a heroic outlaw who stole from the rich to give to the poor, was loved and respected by the people, but he had long been a difficult case for the Yard. With the help of Sherlock, detective Gordon Gorilla Riller and Carlson Fox finally managed to catch Mack at his daughter Katie's birthday party. But Sherlock was then reviled by the people for arresting their hero. Four years later, Mack fights with the notorious Scarface in prison, and then climbs over the wall to escape. While tracking down Mack, Sherlock discovers Mack's heart-breaking reason behind his escape, and decides to let him fulfill his final wish before he would voluntarily surrender to the police. However, Scarface suddenly appears and kidnaps Katie. Sherlock and Watson team up with Gordon Gorilla Riller and Carlson Fox for the rescue. A battle between life and death is unfolding.
